hero.role: Mechatronics Engineer · AI Specialist · Robotics Technical Leader
hero.statement: I don't just design systems: I build them, test them, and make them work in the real world. My goal is to bridge the gap between engineering theory and effective, high-impact implementation.
hero.tagline: Systems Engineering · Operational Execution · Sustainable Impact

about.title: Professional Profile
about.description: I see technology as a tool to solve real-world problems, not as an end in itself. My experience spans engineering, education, and operations, always focused on creating systems that are reliable, traceable, and ready for production.
about.philosophy: I prefer systems that work for 10 years over brilliant solutions that fail in production.
mindset: Systemic approach: complete processes, not isolated tasks.
High tolerance for incomplete contexts and pressure.

items.description: AI corporate training and consulting firm bridging theory and real-world Industry 4.0 adoption.
points: Designed and delivered 6+ AI training programs across independent entities and institutional clients.
Delivered 2 full courses at Centro de Bienestar Sagezza: 'Introduction to AI' and 'AI Applied to Active Life' for adults 60+.
Delivered 2 courses at Colegio Bilingüe San José Campestre for staff and faculty, also serving as AI Consultant.
Delivered courses on agentic AI systems (Google Antigravity, Manus) to Eduqualityco for real-world automation.
Co-led 2 generative AI courses for Pacific Coast entrepreneurs (label design and prompt engineering) in partnership with Eduqualityco.
Advised organizations on identifying and executing high-ROI AI projects with measurable impact timelines.
Positioned SCIBARU AI as a reference for Industry 4.0 consulting in the region.

items.description: End-to-end operational and strategic leadership of a last-mile logistics startup.
points: Managed traceability and delivery control of 27,500+ packages per month through data systematization.
Developed BaruLogix — a proprietary web platform for logistics tracking, re-dispatch coordination, and data-driven decision-making.
Led intercompany coordination, labeling, sorting, and integration with external delivery partners.
Ensured operational continuity at scale through rigorous process standardization.

items.description: Sole developer across 7+ production web projects using AI-assisted development (vibe coding).
points: Delivered end-to-end solutions for BaruCourier SAS, Colegio Bilingüe San José Campestre, Eduqualityco, and Carnitas by Mr. Cousins.
Managed everything from requirements analysis to final cloud deployment.
Leveraged agentic IDEs (Google Antigravity) and Google AI Studio to accelerate production-quality output.

items.description: Mentorship in the largest international FIRST event, representing Colombia among 190+ nations.
points: Top 4 Worldwide (2024) and Top 8 Worldwide (2020) achievement contributions.
3rd Place Worldwide — Engineering Documentation (2024) lead contributor.
Designed educational strategies for high school students in audiovisual production and international relations.
Led international relations and communication strategy achieving global recognitions for the team (2022–2025).

items.description: Co-founded one of the first FTC teams in Colombia for the inaugural national regional.
points: Lead mechanical design, robot construction, and build strategy aligned with international standards.
Responsible for materials selection and high-performance robotics construction.

items.description: Technical advisor for the 'Pacífico en su Salsa' project digitalization.
points: Structured and optimized educational content for digital learning environments.
Implemented technological tools for educational delivery aligned with Ministry standards.
Bridged cultural heritage and applied AI for label design for Pacific entrepreneurs.

items.description: Educational robotics project lead for international FRC regulations.
points: Designed chassis, mechanisms, and technical documentation in full compliance with FRC rules.
Provided technical support in design and construction of large-scale competition robots.

items.company: Universidad Autónoma de Occidente — COMPAS Program
items.description: Academic and social support for first-semester students during university adaptation.
points: Designed formative strategies for civic education and critical thinking.
Strengthened collaborative skills within an interdisciplinary university context.

items.company: Colegio Bilingüe San José Campestre · Eduqualityco · Carnitas by Mr. Cousins
items.description: Creative and technical advisory for student projects and institutional branding.
points: Produced audiovisual materials and strategic communication support for commercial and educational clients.

items.description: Official evaluation of robot design, performance, and core values.
points: Referee at MakeX (Yumbo): evaluated robot performance and enforced rules.
Judge at FIRST LEGO League (Cali): assessed design and FIRST Core Values.

items.description: Mentored students in applied engineering and electronics.
points: Guided prototype design, embedded systems, and Arduino programming for real-world solutions.

certifications: Generative AI — Google & Palmira Chamber of Commerce

international.title: Global Impact
international.description: Active participation in international science and technology scenarios.
items: National Leader at FIRST Global Challenge (Geneva 2022)
International recognition on social media Team Colombia

contact.title: Contact
contact.message: I am interested in projects where technology has a clear purpose, is executed with rigor, and generates real impact. Always open to conversations involving engineering, innovation, and building systems that work in the real world.
